overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The camera follows a character from an industrial district under elevated highways, across Drake Avenue, through commercial streets with storefronts, into an open plaza with skyscrapers, and finally descends into an underground tunnel.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along industrial sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in yellow protective suit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: rusted metal highway structure casting shadows on the street below
green painted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
concrete wall with red and blue graffiti tags
distant industrial structures with pipes and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial urban sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway girders. The camera follows a character in red walking ahead, while other pedestrians including one in a yellow hazmat suit approach from the opposite direction. Green metal railings line the left side of the path, and graffiti-covered walls appear on the right.

events.description: approaching and entering Drake Ave intersection crosswalk
turning left at street corner onto new sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing Drake Ave intersection and turning left at the corner

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along Drake Ave through the intersection

entered.detail: orange street sign with white text reading Drake Ave
painted white lines marking pedestrian crossing area
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open intersection at Drake Ave, passing under an orange street sign while a black car drives through. After crossing, the camera turns left onto a new sidewalk, transitioning from the sheltered highway underpass to a more open street corner before turning back into shadow.

events.description: passing Brain Wash laundromat with distinctive purple neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial sidewalk passing various storefronts and street vendors

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground near cardboard boxes and belongings

entered.detail: dark gray corrugated metal warehouse building with vertical ridges
storefront with purple neon circular sign reading Brain Wash
wall covered in vibrant multicolored street art and murals
orange and white striped plastic barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a dark industrial metal building on the left, the camera passes a homeless encampment and approaches the Brain Wash laundromat with its glowing purple neon sign. The path remains under the elevated highway structure, with construction barriers and cardboard boxes lining the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with corporate skyscrapers

events.description: emerging from under elevated highways into bright sunlit open plaza
approaching underground tunnel entrance with red concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the tunnel entrance, passing palm trees

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel corporate towers reflecting sunlight
tropical palm trees lining the plaza walkway
low-rise commercial building with distinctive red facade
concrete staircase leading down into the ground with red walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadow of the elevated highways into a bright sunlit plaza, the scene reveals towering glass skyscrapers in the distance and palm trees lining the walkway. The camera crosses the open area toward a red-walled underground tunnel entrance, leaving the industrial district behind for a more corporate urban environment.

events.description: transitioning from bright sunlight to dim artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: descending the concrete stairs into the dark underground tunnel

entered.detail: concrete steps leading downward into the tunnel system
overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the tunnel
colorful spray paint tags on the concrete tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent into an underground pedestrian tunnel. The camera moves down concrete stairs bordered by red walls, transitioning from the bright outdoor plaza into the dimly lit tunnel illuminated by fluorescent lights. Graffiti covers the walls as the environment becomes fully enclosed and artificial.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually opens into a corporate plaza before descending into a subterranean tunnel. It begins on a sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway girders, following a character in red past pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera crosses the intersection at Drake Avenue, the scene transitions from the sheltered underpass to an open street corner before shifting back into the shadows of a narrow walkway lined with a homeless encampment and the purple neon glow of a laundromat. The environment then expands as the camera emerges from the highway's shadow into a bright, sunlit plaza featuring palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers. Finally, the camera leaves the open corporate landscape behind, descending concrete stairs between red walls to enter a dimly lit underground tunnel illuminated by fluorescent lights.
